song.title: Make Me a Blessing
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) Out in the highways And byways of life Many are weary and sad,|| Carry the sunshine Where darkness is rife, Making the sorrowing glad.
[C] Chorus Make me a blessing, Make me a blessing, Out of my life may Jesus shine;|| Make me a blessing, O Savior, I pray, Make me a blessing to someone today.
[V2] 2) Tell the sweet story Of Christ and His love, Tell of His pow’r to forgive;|| Others will trust Him if only you prove True every moment you live.
[V3] 3) Give as ’twas given To you in your need, Love as the Master loved you;|| Be to the helpless a helper indeed, Unto your mission be true.
song.author: Ira B. Wilson
